ideation: This animation sequence shows a robot carefully lifting a piece of luggage.  The robot will use both arms to lift the luggage from the ground, and then hold it for a moment before putting it down, simulating a person carefully handling luggage. The movement will be slow and deliberate to emphasize the care taken in handling the item. Frame 1 shows both arms extended slightly forward in preparation for lifting, Frame 2 shows the luggage being lifted with both arms. Frame 3 shows the robot holding the luggage steady for a moment before putting it down, and Frame 4 shows the robot carefully putting the luggage down.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, ready to grasp luggage
both arms lift the luggage smoothly upwards
holding the luggage steady, a moment of pause
carefully lowering the luggage back to the ground
